caption: A man in a maroon blazer speaks into a handheld microphone, gesturing with his hand while another man in a white shirt stands beside him. Behind them, a large green and yellow backdrop features images of a man in a white Nehru jacket and a man in a white dhoti and shawl, along with Tamil text including "வாங்கு" and "பார்ப்போம்!". The scene shifts to a wider view, showing a stage where the man in the white Nehru jacket and shawl stands. A security person in a black suit and mask stands nearby, while other individuals are seated in the foreground. A man in a light-colored short-sleeved shirt and khaki pants stands at the edge of the stage. Across the subsequent frames, the composition remains consistent, showing the stage setup, the speakers, and the backdrop, with subtle movements as people stand and observe the event.
